testcase.name: skipNoMarketData
testcase.system-out: 12:38:15 WARN orchestrator.AutonomousLoop - No market data available for BTC/USD — skipping cycle

testcase.name: skipEmptyFeatures
testcase.system-out: 12:38:15 WARN orchestrator.AutonomousLoop - Feature computation returned empty — skipping cycle

testcase.name: skipNullMarketData
testcase.system-out: 12:38:15 WARN orchestrator.AutonomousLoop - No market data available for BTC/USD — skipping cycle
